parsed.production_notes: The video features human actors in a natural setting with realistic lighting and interactions. There are no signs of AI generation such as uncanny faces, unnatural movements, or synthetic backgrounds.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian man in his late 20s with a medium build and a dusky complexion. He has short, dark, somewhat messy hair, a mustache, and light stubble.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue and white checkered button-down shirt with sleeves rolled up to the elbows, paired with light blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Initially skeptical and slightly condescending, his expression shifts to surprise and then genuine interest and eagerness.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early to mid-20s with a slim build and a fair complexion. She has long, straight, dark hair parted in the middle. She has soft facial features.
characters.wardrobe: A white three-quarter sleeve top with a pink floral pattern, black track pants, and a magenta-colored scarf (dupatta) draped around her neck. She wears a watch with a green strap on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Initially appears slightly annoyed and defensive, then becomes confident, articulate, and assertive. She ends by being persuasive and encouraging when addressing the camera.

scenes.setting: An indoor living room setting. The characters are seated on a patterned couch against a plain, beige-colored wall. The lighting is simple and functional.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium shot of a young South Asian man (Character A) and a young South Asian woman (Character B) sitting side-by-side on a couch. They are engaged in a conversation. Character A, on the left, gestures with his hands while speaking with a doubtful expression. Character B, on the right, listens and then responds confidently, also using hand gestures to make her point. The background is a simple beige wall with a white electrical outlet visible.

scenes.visual_description: A vertically-oriented video showing a man and a woman conversing on a couch. A persistent red banner with white Hindi text is at the top of the frame. As the characters speak, dynamic subtitles appear at the bottom, first in Hindi (Romanized) and then in English, corresponding to the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ठीक है, मान गया कि तुम्हें जॉब करनी है। लेकिन जॉब में सबसे इंग्लिश में बात करनी पड़ती है। तुम तो हिंदी मीडियम से हो। हर दूसरी चीज़ का मतलब तुम मुझसे पूछती हो। [Okay, I agree you want to get a job. But in a job, you have to speak in English with everyone. You are from a Hindi medium background. You ask me the meaning of every other thing.]

Character B says: For your information, I can speak English fluently and confidently. I don't need any help in understanding anything. I used to be topper in my school. And I can contribute better to my family with a job.

Character A says: अरे, तुमने इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कैसे सीखी? [Hey, how did you learn such good English?]

Character B says: मैंने SpeakX ऐप डाउनलोड किया है। इसके AI टीचर के साथ जब तुम ऑफिस जाते थे तब मैं प्रैक्टिस करती थी। और दो हफ्ते में मेरी इंग्लिश एकदम फर्स्ट क्लास हो गई है। अब मैं कहीं भी इंग्लिश में बात कर सकती हूं। [I have downloaded the SpeakX app. With its AI teacher, I used to practice when you went to the office. And in two weeks, my English has become first-class. Now I can speak in English anywhere.]

Character A says: AI? कितने पैसे खर्च हुए इसपे? [AI? How much money was spent on this?]

Character B says: एक कप चाय से भी कम। [Less than a cup of tea.]

Character A says: क्या बात कर रही हो? फिर तो मैं आज ही से ट्राय करूंगा। मुझे भी ऑफिस में इंग्लिश काम आएगी। कब तक एक ही सैलरी पे रहूंगा। [What are you saying? Then I will try it from today itself. English will be useful for me in the office too. How long will I remain on the same salary?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
हिंदी मीडियम से भी जल्दी फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश सिर्फ speakx के साथ (Fluent English faster than from Hindi medium only with speakx)

scenes.setting: An indoor living room setting. The characters are seated on a patterned couch against a plain, beige-colored wall. The lighting is simple and functional.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of the young South Asian woman (Character B). She has turned to look directly at the camera, breaking the fourth wall. She speaks with a persuasive and friendly expression, using an 'OK' hand gesture to emphasize her point. Character A is partially visible and out of focus in the background to her right.

scenes.visual_description: Character B turns to address the audience directly, delivering a call to action. The red banner at the top and subtitles at the bottom remain visible. Character A is visible in the background, listening.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: क्या आप भी मेरी तरह सबको चौंकाना चाहते हैं? तो आज ही SpeakX इंस्टॉल करो और दो हफ्ते में फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलो। [Do you also want to surprise everyone like me? Then install SpeakX today and speak fluent English in two weeks.]
